canvas.name: Life cell (one cell, primitives exposed)
canvas.description: A single Game-of-Life cell rebuilt from primitives: Tick periodically kicks CellState; on each kick CellState emits `report(alive)` out to ReportFan (which would fan to 8 neighbors); Aggregator collects 8 inbound reports and emits `total(sum)` back to CellState, which applies the Conway B3/S23 rule and updates `alive`.
